basics.name: Jia-Hao (Howard) He
basics.summary: Computational imaging researcher specializing in synchrotron X-ray tomography, 3D deep learning, and HPC-based reconstruction pipelines. Postdoctoral Research Associate at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign.

work.company: Soils Laboratory, University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign
work.summary: Synchrotron micro-XCT, deep learning segmentation, HPC pipelines for soil science.
highlights: Recurring synchrotron micro-XCT campaigns at APS 2-BM beamline; novel dual-energy contrast-enhanced approach with iodine staining
Transformer-based 3D supervised segmentation for pore network analysis and organic matter mapping
HPC reconstruction/inference pipelines on ALCF Polaris and NERSC Perlmutter with tomocupy
Noise2Inverse self-supervised denoising: PSNR +4.38 dB, SSIM +0.015 on APS 2-BM soil XCT data

work.company: Soil Machine Dynamics Laboratory, Iowa State University
work.summary: AI-enabled tillage decision systems and ML models for soil characterization.
highlights: Designed site-specific tillage decision systems with sensitivity analysis and machine learning
Developed ML models to predict tillage performance and crop yield from multi-sensor datasets

work.company: Center for GIS and RCHSS, Academia Sinica
work.position: GIS for Agriculture Summer Research Intern
work.summary: AI workflows for rice growth monitoring using satellite data and Google Earth Engine.
highlights: Developed NDVI-based deep learning pipelines for rice yield prediction with Sentinel-2
Fused multimodal remote sensing signals for crop monitoring under extreme conditions

work.company: Department of Mathematics, Iowa State University
work.summary: Instructed Introduction to Data Science, Calculus 1–3, and general physics.

work.company: Agricultural Automation and Robotics Laboratory, Iowa State University
work.position: Robotic Integration and Computer Vision Assistant
work.summary: Deep learning for corn feature extraction and gradient-based algorithm optimization.

work.company: Advanced Structures and Materials Laboratory, National Taiwan University
work.summary: Multiphysics FEM simulations and vibrational sensors for structural damage detection.

education.area: Ph.D., Agricultural and Biosystems Engineering; Minor in Applied Mathematics
Master of Engineering, Agricultural and Biosystems Engineering; Minor in Applied Mathematics
Master of Science, Engineering Science and Ocean Engineering
Bachelor of Science, Systems and Naval Mechatronic Engineering

publications.name: Tillage-induced soil feature extraction and multi-sensors fusion for tillage system classification
publications.summary: Jia-Hao He, Steven K Mickelson, Jerry L Hatfield, and Mehari Z Tekeste. Biosystems Engineering 261, p. 104329.

publications.name: Development of a Method for Soil Tilth Quality Evaluation from Crumbling Roller Baskets Using Deep Machine Learning Models
publications.summary: Tekeste, Mehari Z, Junxian Guo, Desale Habtezgi, Jia-Hao He, and Marcin Waz. Sensors 24.11, p. 3379.
